name: Agua 301 Restaurant

notes: Every one of the 195 frozen rows was reconciled against the current restaurant-issued food and drink pages captured on 2026-07-14.

The current food page contains 432 raw item nodes across ten menu surfaces; 29 are headings or package instructions, leaving 403 real presentations and 298 distinct food formulations after exact name-and-description consolidation.
Three current non-alcoholic beverages were added from the restaurant-issued drink page; alcohol was intentionally excluded from the app catalog.
Ten frozen rows are headings, instructions, generic package labels, or alcohol, and three older products are absent from every current surface.
Agua 301 publishes item descriptions but no complete allergen matrix, complete recipes, or cross-contact policy.
Positive signals use only fixed published ingredients and mandatory named formats; optional add-ons, optional family-meal protein choices, and optional flour requests are excluded.
Forty-five applicable frozen rows mismatch: 21 underreported, seven overreported, and 17 collapsed current formulations with different fixed signals.
Eggplant does not produce egg, coconut does not produce tree-nut, and generic package warnings are not assigned as item allergens.

The frozen merge flattened ten food, catering, banquet, and breakfast surfaces, promoted structural nodes as products, retained stale rows, and collapsed same-name formulations whose descriptions differ.
The correction preserves meal and section ownership, consolidates only exact normalized name-and-description repeats, and keeps distinct formulations where their fixed descriptions differ.
The source-bounded mapper removes optional-choice clauses before evaluating fixed ingredient terms and does not infer a complete allergen-free claim from absent text.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Confirmed the Agua 301 identity and current restaurant-issued menu and ordering routes.
Captured and parsed all ten current food, catering, banquet, and breakfast surfaces.
Captured the restaurant-issued ordering route and confirmed it did not disclose a more complete allergen source than the published menu descriptions.
Captured the current drink page, retained its three non-alcoholic products, and excluded alcohol from the app catalog.
Found restaurant-issued descriptions but no complete allergen matrix, recipes, or cross-contact policy.

findings.summary: The frozen 195-row catalog mixed products with headings and instructions, omitted current formulations, retained three stale products, and lost section ownership across ten current food surfaces.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 301 current food and non-alcoholic beverage formulations across 51 meal-and-section categories and excluded structural nodes, stale rows, and alcohol.

findings.summary: Forty-five applicable frozen rows disagree with current fixed published ingredient signals, including optional choices promoted as mandatory and fixed ingredients omitted.
findings.resolution: Recomputed each current formulation from its fixed description, excluded optional-choice clauses, and left 104 current rows unavailable where positive evidence is insufficient.

findings.summary: Seventeen frozen rows collapse current same-name formulations that carry different fixed ingredient signals on different menu surfaces.
findings.resolution: Consolidated only exact name-and-description repeats and retained separately formulated meal-and-section presentations.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 301-formulation Agua 301 catalog across 51 current restaurant-issued categories with 197 positive source-bounded rows, 104 unavailable rows, and all structural, stale, and alcohol rows excluded.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=/tmp/agua-301-repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 301 items, 51 categories, 197 positive rows, 104 unavailable rows, non-alcoholic beverages last, and structural/alcohol rows excluded)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 403 food presentations plus three non-alcoholic beverages, consolidated to 301 formulations across 51 categories; 197 positive rows and 104 unavailable rows.
